title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · State Clinic: Side Effect Ledger
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops side effect ledger increment in a tested tool-loop state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record intended and observed side effects for idempotency and audit.
Update loop state from complete, partial, empty, and conflicting tool results.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
